reviews.review_description: I used to play it almost 6 hours a day. It was peak fun awesome. It was the Mona Lisa I loved it if I could give it 20 stars if I could I still remember everybody screaming scared me at the nexbots I miss the challenging part of it trying to find each key. It was art and awesomeness I know y’all might not see this, but please bring this masterpiece ￼back please bring it back to the store get anything you need to bring it back. I’m gonna end this review here if you see this, please bring the memories back ￼
I miss the old days. I played this game whenever it came out. But now it’s just forgotten. It used to be so popular. So fun. It was perfect. I miss this game. ￼

I loved this game the Christmas update the ￼most and remember all the games u used to play bek night  monkey mischief, gorilla tag it was peak. It was more than that it was perfect. I have nothing else to do so I’m writing this.

This game was peak back in the day but the lobbys were glitched and this game was forgotten in the dust.The owner had to take down the game because of the glitches and said there would be a beknight 2 but there was no more updates about since 2023
This game was soooo fun back in the day until smth happened to it, it started glitching and no people in the lobby’s I hope the creator could fix it cuz this game was good assss helll
